creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Kurt Jaeger from comment #5)

cad/sumo: configure: error: gtest-includes not found.
  does not look like it's gdal-related

astro/qlandkartegt: It's basically on-hold upstream, sucessor is
  astro/qmapshack
  https://bitbucket.org/maproom/qmapshack/wiki/Home

The postgis failures: I don't understand those.
See
  https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/postgis20-2.0.7_6.log
  https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/postgis21-2.1.8_3.log
  https://people.freebsd.org/~pi/logs/postgis22-2.2.6_3.log
